title: Garlicky Velvety British Chicken Wings Skewers
description: A festive British twist on chicken wings: juicy, garlicky, and velvety from melted butter, roasted in an air fryer on skewers for a quick and crispy finish.

ingredients.name: chicken wings
ingredients.notes: separated into drumettes and flat portions

ingredients.name: bamboo skewers
ingredients.notes: soaked in water for 30 minutes to prevent burning

instructions: Whisk together minced garlic, melted butter, olive oil, lemon juice, smoked paprika, thyme, salt, and pepper in a large bowl.
Add the chicken wings, tossing to coat thoroughly. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to penetrate.
Thread the marinated wings onto the soaked bamboo skewers, leaving a bit of space between each piece for even airflow.
Arrange the skewered wings in a single layer in the air fryer basket, ensuring they are not touching.

Cook for 15 minutes, then carefully flip each skewer and brush with a little extra sauce. Continue cooking for an additional 6–8 minutes, or until the wings are golden‑brown and the internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
Remove the skewers from the air fryer and let them rest for 3 minutes before serving.
Sprinkle with chopped parsley and serve immediately, optionally with lemon wedges and a side of Yorkshire pudding or mint sauce.
Enjoy your garlicky, velvety British chicken wing skewers with friends or family at a festive gathering!
